title: Maglev Phi Untag Incorrectly Uses Type Information, Leading to Type Confusion
description_snippet:
## Details


### 1. Maglev Graph Build
The vulnerability exists in the Maglev Untag Phi optimization. Below is the peeled loop generated by the Maglev Graph Builder. The issue occurs in the handling of the `smi` variable.

```js

        4: InitialValue(r0), 3 uses    // smi
